general.name: Jamf Connect Login Saks
general.description: Jamf Connect Login Settings Saks Okta
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>aa09db8b-945c-4123-8663-4a331ccd20a8</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>aa09db8b-945c-4123-8663-4a331ccd20a8</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Jamf Connect Login Saks</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Jamf Connect Login Settings</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom Settings</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>AF6625C5-FDFA-4071-B526-7238167A5F03</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ManagedClient.preferences</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>0F6D660F-F4EC-4450-9996-5F231C5C667E</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>com.jamf.connect.login</key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>AllowNetworkSelection</key><true/><key>AuthServer</key><string>saks.okta.com</string><key>BackgroundImage</key><string>/usr/local/jamfconnect/saks.jpg</string><key>CreateAdminUser</key><false/><key>CreateJamfConnectPassword</key><true/><key>DenyLocal</key><false/><key>LocalFallback</key><true/><key>LoginLogo</key><string>/usr/local/jamfconnect/sakslogo.png</string><key>Migrate</key><true/><key>OIDCHideRestart</key><false/><key>OIDCHideShutdown</key><false/><key>OIDCIgnoreAdmin</key><false/><key>OIDCNewPassword</key><false/><key>OIDCProvider</key><string>Okta</string><key>OIDCRedirectURI</key><string>https://127.0.0.1/jamfconnect</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Jamf Connect Settings</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Jamf Connect Login</string><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>AF6625C5-FDFA-4071-B526-7238167A5F03</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.jamf.connect.login</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>6B31A611-1C08-4CFD-BB0B-B350E27CA04E</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>DenyLocalExcluded</key><array><string>saks</string></array><key>MigrateUsersHide</key><array><string>saks</string></array></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
